results.description: All features to_do, no dependencies — should suggest critical priority first
results.reason: Setting up the development environment is the critical first step. It directly enables all subsequent tasks by providing the necessary tools and project structure, aligning with the project's vision of a functional web application. Completing this task unblocks the high-priority task of fetching transaction data.

results.description: F001 complete — F002 dependency now met, should suggest F002
results.reason: This task is the next logical step towards achieving the project's success criteria. Fetching transaction data is crucial for displaying the user's transactions, directly aligning with the project vision of tracking Ethereum transactions in real time. Completing this task unblocks the high-priority 'Display Transactions' feature.

results.description: F001 and F002 complete — only F003 remaining and unblocked
results.reason: This task directly contributes to the success criteria by rendering the fetched transaction data in a user-friendly format. Completing this will allow users to view their transaction history, which is the core functionality of the application and unblocks future UI/UX improvements.

results.description: Two features ready with same priority — scope flagged one vs clean one. Should prefer clean.
results.reason: Setting up the development environment is the most critical first step. It directly enables all subsequent tasks by providing the necessary tools and project structure. This aligns with the project vision by laying the groundwork for building the Ethereum transaction tracker.

results.description: Scope flagged feature with low confidence unblocks more work but is risky — should prefer safe feature first
results.reason: Setting up the development environment is the most critical first step. It directly enables all subsequent tasks and is essential for progress. This task has high confidence and fits within the budget.

results.description: Medium priority feature ready, high priority feature blocked. Should pick the ready medium one.
results.reason: Setting up the development environment (F003) is critical because it unblocks the high-priority task of fetching transaction data (F001). This aligns with the project vision by establishing the foundation for building the Ethereum transaction tracker. Completing this task first ensures a smooth development process.

results.description: All high priority features done, only low confidence feature remains. Should still suggest it.
results.reason: This task directly contributes to the success criteria by allowing users to filter transactions, enhancing the app's usability. It is the only task available to start now, and completing it will provide a more functional and user-friendly experience, aligning with the project vision.

results.description: Two features ready, one directly enables success criteria, one does not. Should prefer the one tied to success criteria.
results.reason: This task directly addresses the success criteria by enabling the display of transaction data in a user-friendly format. Completing this high-priority task moves the project closer to a functional web app and unlocks further development of the user interface.
